title: VibrantCraft
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/3rs8reE.png)
# Make Minecraft More Vibrant/Saturated!
The Vibrancy factor of most Textures is 1.75

## Changes:
- Blocks, Items, Entities, Effects, Paintings, Particles, Misc, Colormap, environment and partially the GUI
- Changes the Colormap (biome textures) to be more vibrant
